name: Monday CRM
highlight_text: Category: Visual CRM for Creative & Project-Driven Agencies
description:
What Monday CRM Does

Monday CRM brings project management and CRM together with its visual, drag-and-drop interface. Agencies love it for its flexibility in managing both leads and deliverables in one place.

Source: Monday

Key Features

🏆AI‑powered assistance for automated task generation, email composition, content summarization, and formula building.

🏆Customizable pipelines to edit deal stages and more.

🏆One‑click automations assign leads, set reminders, send notifications when emails are opened, and move deals between stages.

🏆Create personalized sequences, schedule mass emails, and track engagement.

🏆Integrations with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, Mailchimp, DocuSign, and more.

🏆Manage pipelines on the go, log calls, and run on‑brand email campaigns directly from the CRM.

🏆Pre‑sales to post‑sales management from lead management to deal management, and post‑sales management.

Benefits

  • Combines CRM & Project Management: Ideal for creative or hybrid agencies.
  • Highly Customizable: Visual boards adapt to any workflow.
  • Improves Team Collaboration: Keeps projects and client data connected.

Pricing

  • Basic: From US $12 per seat/month
  • Standard: US $17 per seat/month
  • Pro: US $28 per seat/month
  • Enterprise: Custom pricing

Pros

✅ Flexible and visually intuitive

✅ Combines CRM, project, and workflow management

✅ Easy to use for non-technical teams

Cons

🚫 Limited advanced CRM reporting

🚫 Add-ons needed for marketing automation

‍
what_people_say:
What Customers Say

“It is so useful for managing, organizing, and keeping track of our customers. We are able to see every step of their journey with us due to the Monday CRM…There are a lot of tiny steps to learn, and it was difficult to integrate it within our company.”

– Emily W.
summing_up_description:
Summing Up…

Choosing a Pipedrive alternative isn’t about finding a bigger or more expensive CRM but aligning the tool with your agency’s current needs and plans. If you want a full operating system that handles invoicing, proposals, and marketing apps, Synup OS offers unparalleled value for mid‑sized agencies. For teams looking for an ecosystem that starts free and scales, HubSpot Sales Hub’s free tier and robust paid options are appealing. Zoho CRM delivers AI‑powered insights and automation at budget‑friendly prices.

‍

Get Started with Synup

Imagine managing every part of your agency (leads, projects, campaigns, invoices, and client reporting) from a single, intuitive dashboard. That’s exactly what Synup OS enables.

With its white-label client portal, churn forecasting, and free suite of marketing apps, Synup is the growth engine your agency has been waiting for.

✅ Automate your invoicing and payments
✅ Centralize client data and campaign tracking
✅ Offer white-labeled marketing tools to boost client retention and revenue

Ready to see how Synup OS can transform your agency?

‍
👉 Book a demo and explore how to grow faster without adding extra tools.

‍
